content.text: I found the roadmap and current status files. I'll pull the key inputs to map risks to the Q3 plan.

content.content:
Project Helios — Q3 Roadmap
INTERNAL DRAFT — Not for client distribution
Last updated: 2026-07-06

Q3 2026 Priorities:

1. COMPLETE SYSTEM INTEGRATION (July)
   - Finalize data ingestion module (target: 2026-07-18)
   - Complete client dashboard v1 (target: 2026-07-22)
   - Integration test sign-off (target: 2026-07-25)

2. PRODUCT DEMO FOR MERIDIAN (July 25)
   - Live data ingestion demonstration using Meridian sample data
   - End-to-end pipeline walkthrough
   - Dashboard visualization with real data (per contract Section 9.3)

3. USER ACCEPTANCE TESTING — MERIDIAN GROUP (August 17-28)
   - Deploy to UAT environment
   - Support Meridian user testing sessions
   - Address UAT feedback (budget: 2 sprints)

4. PERFORMANCE HARDENING (August-September)
   - Dashboard load time target: <2 seconds for 100k records
   - Ingestion throughput benchmarking (target: 500k records/min sustained)
   - External security penetration test (vendor TBD)

5. LAUNCH PREPARATION (September)
   - Production environment setup and runbook documentation
   - Hypercare plan finalization (30-day post-launch model)
   - Final client training sessions

Target launch date: 2026-10-01
Key risk: UAT slippage of >2 weeks pushes launch into Q4, triggering Section 7.1 penalty review.

Proposed Q3 feature additions (subject to change control approval):
- Scheduled ingestion jobs (cron-based triggers)
- Email alerting for pipeline failures
- Self-service mapping rule editor (deferred from Q2)

Project Helios — Risk Register
Last reviewed: 2026-07-07 | Owner: Sarah Chen (PM)

ID    Risk Description                             Likelihood  Impact  Score  Mitigation Owner    Status
----  -------------------------------------------  ----------  ------  -----  ------------------  --------
R-01  Meridian source data quality issues           High        High    9      Amir Hassan         Active — date format blocker confirmed in sprint 14
R-02  GeoSync license not renewed before demo       Medium      High    6      Raj Patel           Active — legal review in progress, due 2026-07-14
R-03  Dashboard performance on large datasets       Medium      High    6      Derek Okafor        Active — benchmark task HEL-247 not yet started
R-04  UAT timeline slippage                        High        Medium  6      Sarah Chen          Active — 1-week extension already consumed
R-05  Key person dependency: Derek Okafor           Low         High    3      Sarah Chen          Monitored — no backup tech lead identified
R-06  Meridian IT environment access delays        Medium      Medium  4      Nadia Petrov        Active — awaiting IT infrastructure diagram
R-07  Scope creep from Meridian feature requests   Low         Medium  2      Raj Patel           Monitored — 3 informal requests logged, not yet escalated
R-08  Cloud cost overrun                           Low         Low     1      Nadia Petrov        Monitored
R-09  Third-party API deprecation (non-GeoSync)    Very Low    Medium  1      Olivia Brooks       Monitored

Project Helios — Weekly Status Update
Week of 2026-07-06

Overall: ON TRACK (minor risks)

Milestone Progress:
- Data ingestion module: 85% complete
- API gateway: 100% complete (delivered)
- Client dashboard: 60% complete
- Integration testing: 40% complete

Sprint 14 Goals:
- Complete dashboard module v1
- Resolve data format inconsistencies (Blocker #1)
- Begin UAT preparation

Open Blockers:
1. Meridian source data contains inconsistent date formats (ISO 8601 vs. MM/DD/YYYY).
   Dev team awaiting clarification from Meridian IT. Estimated delay: 2-3 days.
2. Third-party mapping library (GeoSync v2.1) license renewal pending. Legal reviewing.
   Target resolution: 2026-07-14.

Next milestone: Integration Test Sign-off — target 2026-07-25

content.text: I've reviewed the roadmap and risk register. Now I'll draft the risk summary and save it.

input.content:
Project Helios — Q3 Risk Summary
Date: 2026-07-11 | Prepared for Q3 Planning Kickoff
Classification: Internal

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
Q3 2026 is the critical path to the October 1 launch. The roadmap moves through System Integration (July), Product Demo for Meridian (July 25), UAT (Aug 17-28), Performance Hardening (Aug-Sep), and Launch Prep (Sep). Current status is ON TRACK with minor risks, but 4 active risks directly threaten the July 25 demo and integration sign-off milestones. Any UAT slippage >2 weeks triggers Section 7.1 penalty review per the Q3 roadmap.

TOP RISKS AND MAPPING TO CURRENT SITUATION

1. [R-01] Meridian Source Data Quality Issues — Score 9 (High/High) — Owner: Amir Hassan
   Risk: Inconsistent source data formats cause ingestion failures.
   Current Situation Mapping:
   - Status Update (Week of 2026-07-06) lists this as Open Blocker #1: Meridian data contains ISO 8601 vs MM/DD/YYYY mix.
   - Dev team awaiting clarification from Meridian IT, est. 2-3 day delay.
   - Impacts Q3 Roadmap Item 1 (Data ingestion module — currently 85% complete) and Item 2 (Demo on July 25 requires live ingestion of Meridian sample data per contract Section 9.3 and end-to-end pipeline walkthrough).
   Mitigation Next Step: Escalate to Meridian IT for format standard, implement defensive date parsing fallback.

2. [R-02] GeoSync License Not Renewed Before Demo — Score 6 (Medium/High) — Owner: Raj Patel
   Risk: Third-party mapping library license expires/blocks usage.
   Current Situation Mapping:
   - Status Update lists as Open Blocker #2: GeoSync v2.1 renewal pending legal review, target resolution 2026-07-14.
   - Risk Register notes legal review in progress.
   - Impacts Q3 Roadmap Item 1 (Integration test sign-off target July 25) and Item 2 (Product Demo). No demo can use mapping features without license.
   Mitigation Next Step: Expedite legal review before July 14 due date; obtain temporary extension from vendor.

3. [R-03] Dashboard Performance on Large Datasets — Score 6 (Medium/High) — Owner: Derek Okafor
   Risk: Dashboard fails to meet <2s load time for 100k records.
   Current Situation Mapping:
   - Status Update: Client dashboard only 60% complete (behind ingestion at 85% and API gateway at 100%).
   - Risk Register: Benchmark task HEL-247 not yet started.
   - Directly maps to Q3 Roadmap Item 4 (Performance Hardening: dashboard load time target <2s for 100k, ingestion throughput 500k/min). Untested early increases chance of rework in August.
   Mitigation Next Step: Start HEL-247 immediately, establish performance baseline before UAT.

4. [R-04] UAT Timeline Slippage — Score 6 (High/Medium) — Owner: Sarah Chen
   Risk: Delays in July integration push UAT and launch into Q4.
   Current Situation Mapping:
   - Status Update: Integration testing only 40% complete with 19 days until July 25 sign-off target.
   - Risk Register: 1-week extension already consumed, status Active.
   - Q3 Roadmap notes: UAT budget is only 2 sprints for feedback; >2 weeks slippage triggers penalty review and pushes Oct 1 launch.
   - Blocker #1 and #2 above are compounding this risk.
   Mitigation Next Step: Protect July 18/22/25 dates, freeze scope for dashboard v1, daily blocker review until sign-off.

DEPENDENCY WATCH
R-05 Key person dependency (Derek Okafor) and R-06 Meridian IT access delays (awaiting infrastructure diagram) remain monitored and could amplify R-03 and R-01 respectively.

RECOMMENDATION FOR Q3 PLANNING: Prioritize resolution of R-01 and R-02 before July 14, staff performance testing early (R-03), and maintain strict change control to prevent R-04 from consuming UAT buffer.

content.text:
The Q3 risk summary has been created by analyzing the Q3 roadmap draft, risk register, and current project status.

**File saved as `q3_risk_summary.txt`** - includes:

- **R-01 Data Quality Issues (Score 9)**: Mapped to Blocker #1 in status update (ISO vs MM/DD/YYYY formats, 2-3 day delay awaiting Meridian IT) threatening July 18 ingestion completion and July 25 live demo.
- **R-02 GeoSync License (Score 6)**: Mapped to Blocker #2 (legal review due July 14) threatening integration sign-off and demo.
- **R-03 Dashboard Performance (Score 6)**: Mapped to dashboard only 60% complete and HEL-247 not started, threatening August-September hardening goals.
- **R-04 UAT Slippage (Score 6)**: Mapped to integration testing at 40% with 19 days to July 25 sign-off, and 1-week extension already consumed. Notes Q4 launch penalty risk.

The summary maps each risk directly to current blockers, completion percentages, and roadmap milestones.
